---
title: "Welcome to My Analytics Lab"
sidebar: false 
---

Ahoj! My name is Işıl Çakır.

This is my personal webpage.

Please stay tuned to follow my works on data analytics, blog posts, and more.

Feel free to connect with me on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/isil-cakir/)!

Dekujeme!

![Hacettepe Analytics Lab](indir (1).jpg){width=20%}
